scripts.check: node --check js/data.js && node --check js/models.js && node --check js/views.js && node --check js/controllers.js && node --check js/app.js && node --check functions/api/progress.js
scripts.db:migrate: npx wrangler d1 execute purunet_english_learning_db --remote --file migrations/0001_english_learning.sql
scripts.pages:deploy: npx wrangler pages deploy . --project-name purunet-english-ebook --branch main
